tagline: Handcrafted cakes for life's most beautiful moments
aboutStory:
Every cake I make starts with a conversation. I want to understand your story — the love you're celebrating, the memory you're creating. Then I bake it in.

I've been baking out of my home kitchen in Burlington, NC for over a decade, and every cake is made entirely by hand, to order. No shortcuts. No prefab layers. Just real ingredients and a lot of heart.
